content:
- Completed task 05 end-to-end: shared runtime-config builder landed, test/example/harness fixtures were centralized, docs were updated, and the task file is marked done with passes=true.
- Required gates all passed: make check, make test, make test-long, and make lint. The completion sequence also ran .ralph/task_switch.sh, committed all changes as aa7ca3f, and pushed to origin/master.
- Worktree is clean now. Stop immediately; the next cycle should start from the new current task pointer chosen by Ralph.

- Read `.ralph/current_tasks.md` and `.ralph/current_tasks_done.md` to choose the next Ralph task.
- Confirmed there are no active failing bug tasks. Resolved blockers for `story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/04-task-migrate-harness-tests-and-docs-to-the-authoritative-managed-conf-model.md`; all referenced blockers already pass true in `.ralph/current_tasks_done.md`.
- Next step is to write that task path into `.ralph/current_task.txt` and quit immediately.

- Created `.ralph/current_task.txt` because it did not exist.
- Wrote the selected task path: `.ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/04-task-migrate-harness-tests-and-docs-to-the-authoritative-managed-conf-model.md`.
- Selection is complete; quitting immediately as required.

- Started new Ralph cycle after finishing the previous task and read the prior progress log entry.
- Read .ralph/current_task.txt and found the active task path: .ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/04-task-migrate-harness-tests-and-docs-to-the-authoritative-managed-conf-model.md.
- Next I am reading the task file to determine whether it expects first-pass planning, skeptical verification of an existing plan, or direct execution.

- Read the active task file and confirmed it is still in the pre-plan state: no TO BE VERIFIED or NOW EXECUTE marker is present yet.
- Searched the target code/docs surfaces. Current evidence says the HA startup assertion and several managed-config docs are already landed, while the remaining real gap is the raw postgresql.conf append helper in src/test_harness/pg16.rs, its use in src/logging/postgres_ingest.rs tests, and missing troubleshooting/harness doc coverage.
- Next I am checking nearby Ralph task files to mirror the expected plan-writing format before editing the active task file.

- Wrote the first-pass detailed execution plan into the active task file .ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/04-task-migrate-harness-tests-and-docs-to-the-authoritative-managed-conf-model.md.
- The plan records the current repo state: SHOW config_file/hba_file/ident_file assertions are already present, core managed-config docs are mostly aligned, and the remaining concrete work is the raw pg16 harness helper, the postgres_ingest real-binary test, and targeted troubleshooting/contributor doc updates.
- Added the required TO BE VERIFIED marker at the end of the task file and confirmed it is present. Per the task workflow, I should stop now and let the next pass do the skeptical review that must alter at least one thing before execution.

- Read the prior progress log and confirmed the active Ralph task is .ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/04-task-migrate-harness-tests-and-docs-to-the-authoritative-managed-conf-model.md.
- I am now reading the task file to determine whether this pass must skeptically revise the plan or execute it; the previous pass ended after writing TO BE VERIFIED.
- Next I need to inspect the current marker in the task file, then either alter the plan and leave NOW EXECUTE or execute strictly against that plan.

- Read the active task file in TO BE VERIFIED state and did a skeptical repo-backed review rather than accepting the first-pass plan as-is.
- I changed the plan materially before switching it to NOW EXECUTE: added the missed raw postgresql.conf mutation in src/pginfo/worker.rs as an explicit review/exception scope, downgraded src/test_harness/ha_e2e/startup.rs to verification-first because SHOW config_file/hba_file/ident_file assertions are already present, and added make docs-build plus make docs-hygiene before the required gate sequence because the required make targets do not build the mdBook output.
- Next pass should read NOW EXECUTE and execute the plan directly without re-exploring.

- Read the active task file and confirmed the marker is NOW EXECUTE, so this pass must execute the written plan directly rather than doing another planning round.
- The task file already contains the authoritative checklist and the narrowed execution scope: pg16 harness API cleanup, the ingest/pginfo direct-Postgres exceptions, troubleshooting and contributor docs, then docs/gate verification.
- Next I am reading only the plan-listed files and will patch them to remove the generic raw postgresql.conf helper story while preserving explicit vanilla-Postgres exceptions.

- Finished the planned code/doc edits: the generic pg16 raw-conf helper was renamed to an explicit vanilla-Postgres exception path, the ingest and pginfo tests now call that explicit helper with comments, silent filesystem error swallowing in the ingest test was removed, and troubleshooting/harness/config docs were updated.
- I also verified the HA startup assertions already cover SHOW config_file/hba_file/ident_file and marked the file-level checklist items complete in the task file while switching the task status to in_progress.
- Next I am running the planned verification stack: make docs-build, make docs-hygiene, make check, make test, make test-long, and make lint, fixing every failure before attempting task completion.

- Verification is complete: make docs-build, make docs-hygiene, make check, make test, make lint, and a final successful make test-long run all passed.
- The first full make test-long run flaked in e2e_no_quorum_fencing_blocks_post_cutoff_commits_and_preserves_integrity, so I created .ralph/tasks/bugs/failsafe-integrity-ultra-long-flake.md with the failing evidence paths and context.
- Next I am finishing the Ralph closeout sequence: mark the task done/passing, run .ralph/task_switch.sh, commit every tracked change including .ralph artifacts, push, and stop immediately.
